hooks.command: [ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; overstory prime --agent merge-orphaned-branches
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; overstory mail check --inject --agent merge-orphaned-branches

[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; [ -z "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && exit 0; read -r INPUT; FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in /*) ;; *) FILE_PATH="$(pwd)/$FILE_PATH" ;; esac; case "$FILE_PATH" in "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH"/*) exit 0 ;; "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH") exit 0 ;; esac; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Path boundary violation: file is outside your assigned worktree. All writes must target files within your worktree."}';

[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; [ -z "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && exit 0; read -r INPUT; FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in /*) ;; *) FILE_PATH="$(pwd)/$FILE_PATH" ;; esac; case "$FILE_PATH" in "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH"/*) exit 0 ;; "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH") exit 0 ;; esac; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Path boundary violation: file is outside your assigned worktree. All writes must target files within your worktree."}';

[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; [ -z "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && exit 0; read -r INPUT; FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"notebook_path": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in /*) ;; *) FILE_PATH="$(pwd)/$FILE_PATH" ;; esac; case "$FILE_PATH" in "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH"/*) exit 0 ;; "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH") exit 0 ;; esac; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Path boundary violation: file is outside your assigned worktree. All writes must target files within your worktree."}';

[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; read -r INPUT; CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed 's/.*"command": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit\s+push\b'; then   echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"git push is blocked — use overstory merge to integrate changes, push manually when ready"}';   exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+reset\s+--hard'; then   echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"git reset --hard is not allowed — it destroys uncommitted work"}';   exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+checkout\s+-b\s'; then   BRANCH=$(echo "$CMD" | sed 's/.*git\s*checkout\s*-b\s*\([^ ]*\).*/\1/');   if ! echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qE '^overstory/merge-orphaned-branches/'; then     echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Branch must follow overstory/merge-orphaned-branches/{bead-id} convention"}';     exit 0;   fi; fi;
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — Task is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — TeamCreate is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — TeamDelete is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — SendMessage is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — TaskCreate is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — TaskUpdate is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — TaskList is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — TaskGet is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — TaskOutput is not allowed"}'
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Overstory agents must use 'overstory sling' for delegation — TaskStop is not allowed"}'

[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; [ -z "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH" ] && exit 0; read -r INPUT; CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed 's/.*"command": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/'); if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'sed\s+-i|sed\s+--in-place|echo\s+.*>|printf\s+.*>|cat\s+.*>|tee\s|\bmv\s|\bcp\s|\brm\s|\bmkdir\s|\btouch\s|\bchmod\s|\bchown\s|>>|\binstall\s|\brsync\s'; then exit 0; fi; PATHS=$(echo "$CMD" | tr ' \t' '\n\n' | grep '^/' | sed 's/[";>]*$//'); [ -z "$PATHS" ] && exit 0; echo "$PATHS" | while IFS= read -r P; do   case "$P" in     "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH"/*) ;;     "$OVERSTORY_WORKTREE_PATH") ;;     /dev/*) ;;     /tmp/*) ;;     *) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Bash path boundary violation: command targets a path outside your worktree. All file modifications must stay within your assigned worktree."}'; exit 0; ;;   esac; done;
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; overstory log tool-start --agent merge-orphaned-branches --stdin

read -r INPUT; CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed 's/.*"command": *"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\bgit\s+push\b'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"git push is blocked — use overstory merge to integrate changes, push manually when ready"}'; exit 0; fi;
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; overstory log tool-end --agent merge-orphaned-branches --stdin
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; overstory mail check --inject --agent merge-orphaned-branches --debounce 500
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; overstory mail check --inject --agent merge-orphaned-branches --debounce 30000
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; overstory log session-end --agent merge-orphaned-branches --stdin
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; mulch learn
[ -z "$OVERSTORY_AGENT_NAME" ] && exit 0; overstory prime --agent merge-orphaned-branches --compact
